title: Data Ingestion
description: The Data Ingestion module enables research teams to upload, map, and transform source data into the OMOP Common Data Model. From flat-file uploads through schema mapping to concept standardization, the ingestion pipeline ensures that incoming datasets are validated and harmonized before being made available for cohort building, analyses, and exploration across the Parthenon platform.
tips: Review your source schema against the OMOP domain definitions before beginning a mapping session to reduce back-and-forth corrections.
Use the concept mapping step to resolve unmapped source codes early; unresolved codes will be excluded from cohort and analysis results.
Upload a small representative sample first to validate your schema mapping configuration before submitting the full dataset.
Monitor the Jobs queue after submission to track ingestion progress and review any row-level validation warnings or errors.
Consult the OMOP Domains appendix for guidance on which source fields map to each standard domain and vocabulary.
